title: Believing in Just
lyrics: The thing that makes you stay instead of run The thing that makes you inhabit yourself like you Don't love the light that was given to me To you, to every fucking thing that you think 1 plus 1, dude It's not too hard to believe in something It's really not that fucking hard to believe in something Why wash away all the pain that you caused You never wanted anything but just sterile cause A reason to be you Is that what you find in the herd? Is that what you believe for you to be you? Is that fucking turd? Hurt me and I don't care to feel you anymore Kill me is the reason you pretend you're not that fucking hard Oh, why you gotta lie to me? I didn't even want the pressure here Tick-tocking away my life and the things that I couldn't experience Why do you care to stay here when you can't get past the Two minute mark of emotional care? Emotional thing, something to believe More than this, more than the Shining glow to your glory No, leave me back at the bell I don't want you to see what I've said It's not fair, believe it in me Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: The thing that makes you stay instead of run
The thing that makes you inhabit yourself like you
Don't love the light that was given to me
To you, to every fucking thing that you think 1 plus 1, dude
It's not too hard to believe in something
It's really not that fucking hard to believe in something
Why wash away all the pain that you caused
You never wanted anything but just sterile cause
A reason to be you
Is that what you find in the herd?
Is that what you believe for you to be you?
Is that fucking turd?
Hurt me and I don't care to feel you anymore
Kill me is the reason you pretend you're not that fucking hard
Oh, why you gotta lie to me?
I didn't even want the pressure here
Tick-tocking away my life and the things that I couldn't experience
Why do you care to stay here when you can't get past the
Two minute mark of emotional care?
Emotional thing, something to believe
More than this, more than the
Shining glow to your glory
No, leave me back at the bell
I don't want you to see what I've said
It's not fair, believe it in me
Thanks for watching!
